languages.original_text: "I have made enquiries into your background, Genetor, and the records are remarkably patchy. In particular, the fifty years preceding your appearance in Furibundus seem to have been assiduously scrubbed out. Who are you really, Februs?"

languages.text: "Я навел справки о вашей биографии, генетор, и в ней поразительно много пробелов. В частности, период длиной в полвека до вашего появления в Фурибундусе, будто бы старательно вымаран. Кто вы на самом деле такой, Фебрус?"

"I have made enquiries into your background, Genetor, and the records are remarkably patchy. In particular, the fifty years preceding your appearance in Furibundus seem to have been assiduously scrubbed out. Who are you really, Februs?"
languages.original_text: "Я навел справки о вашей биографии, генетор, и в ней поразительно много пробелов. В частности, период длиной в полвека до вашего появления в Фурибундусе, будто бы старательно вымаран. Кто вы на самом деле такой, Фебрус?"

"I have made enquiries into your background, Genetor, and the records are remarkably patchy. In particular, the fifty years preceding your appearance in Furibundus seem to have been assiduously scrubbed out. Who are you really, Februs?"

"I have made enquiries into your background, Genetor, and the records are remarkably patchy. In particular, the fifty years preceding your appearance in Furibundus seem to have been assiduously scrubbed out. Who are you really, Februs?"

languages.text: «He realizado múltiples indagaciones sobre su pasado, genetor, y los registros son peculiarmente dispersos. En concreto, los cincuenta años anteriores a su aparición en Furibundus parecen haberse eliminado por completo. ¿Quién es realmente, Februs?».
languages.original_text: "I have made enquiries into your background, Genetor, and the records are remarkably patchy. In particular, the fifty years preceding your appearance in Furibundus seem to have been assiduously scrubbed out. Who are you really, Februs?"

traits.locale_text: «He realizado múltiples indagaciones sobre su pasado, genetor, y los registros son peculiarmente dispersos. En concreto, los cincuenta años anteriores a su aparición en Furibundus parecen haberse eliminado por completo. ¿Quién es realmente, Februs?».

languages.text: 「貴殿の経歴を調べさせてもらった、ゲネター。記録は驚くほど穴だらけだ。とりわけ、貴殿がフリブンドゥスに現れる以前の五十年間は、念入りに消し去られているようだ。貴殿は本当は何者なのだ、フェブラス？」
languages.original_text: "I have made enquiries into your background, Genetor, and the records are remarkably patchy. In particular, the fifty years preceding your appearance in Furibundus seem to have been assiduously scrubbed out. Who are you really, Februs?"

traits.locale_text: 「貴殿の経歴を調べさせてもらった、ゲネター。記録は驚くほど穴だらけだ。とりわけ、貴殿がフリブンドゥスに現れる以前の五十年間は、念入りに消し去られているようだ。貴殿は本当は何者なのだ、フェブラス？」

languages.text: “我调查过你的背景，基因士，关于你的记录残缺得惊人。尤其是你出现在怒焰星系之前的那五十年，似乎被人刻意抹去了。你究竟是谁？”
languages.original_text: "I have made enquiries into your background, Genetor, and the records are remarkably patchy. In particular, the fifty years preceding your appearance in Furibundus seem to have been assiduously scrubbed out. Who are you really, Februs?"

traits.locale_text: “我调查过你的背景，基因士，关于你的记录残缺得惊人。尤其是你出现在怒焰星系之前的那五十年，似乎被人刻意抹去了。你究竟是谁？”

languages.text: "Ich habe Nachforschungen über Euch angestellt, Genetor, und die Daten sind erstaunlich lückenhaft. Insbesondere die fünfzig Jahre vor Eurer Ankunft in Furibundus scheinen gewissenhaft gelöscht worden zu sein. Wer seid Ihr wirklich, Februs?"
languages.original_text: "I have made enquiries into your background, Genetor, and the records are remarkably patchy. In particular, the fifty years preceding your appearance in Furibundus seem to have been assiduously scrubbed out. Who are you really, Februs?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe Nachforschungen über Euch angestellt, Genetor, und die Daten sind erstaunlich lückenhaft. Insbesondere die fünfzig Jahre vor Eurer Ankunft in Furibundus scheinen gewissenhaft gelöscht worden zu sein. Wer seid Ihr wirklich, Februs?"

languages.text: « J'ai enquêté sur votre parcours, genetor, et les archives sont étonnamment peu prolixes à votre sujet. En particulier, la période de cinquante ans avant votre apparition dans le système de Furibundus semble avoir été soigneusement effacée. Qui êtes-vous vraiment, Februs ? »
languages.original_text: "I have made enquiries into your background, Genetor, and the records are remarkably patchy. In particular, the fifty years preceding your appearance in Furibundus seem to have been assiduously scrubbed out. Who are you really, Februs?"

traits.locale_text: « J'ai enquêté sur votre parcours, genetor, et les archives sont étonnamment peu prolixes à votre sujet. En particulier, la période de cinquante ans avant votre apparition dans le système de Furibundus semble avoir été soigneusement effacée. Qui êtes-vous vraiment, Februs ? »

languages.text: "Geçmişini soruşturdum Genetör. Kayıtlar dikkat çekici derecede eksik. Özellikle Furibundus'ta ortaya çıkmandan önceki elli yıl, özenle silinmiş gibi görünüyor. Sen gerçekte kimsin Februs?"
languages.original_text: "I have made enquiries into your background, Genetor, and the records are remarkably patchy. In particular, the fifty years preceding your appearance in Furibundus seem to have been assiduously scrubbed out. Who are you really, Februs?"
